title: Open Source
description: DomusMind is built in the open.

sections.title: Open platform
sections.body: DomusMind is open household infrastructure, not a closed consumer app.

sections.title: How to contribute
sections.body: Contribute through issues, discussions, pull requests, architecture feedback, and domain model improvements.

sections.title: Repository structure
sections.body: The repository contains vision docs, architecture, domain definitions, implementation code, and tests.

sections.title: Roadmap direction
sections.body: Roadmap evolves from foundational modeling to broader domains and intelligent assistance.
